basic_details.job_title: CUTN Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Tamil Nadu (CUTN) has officially announced the Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 with 5 vacancies. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates holding a Master's degree with a minimum of 55% marks in the relevant field along with NET/Ph.D (preferably) and relevant industrial/teaching experience are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications via email on or before 27 July 2026, and the walk-in interview will be held on 28 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and appli

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with minimum 55% marks in the related field with NET/Ph.D preferably with relevant Industrial/teaching experience.
qualification.details: B.Voc in Digital Journalism and Multimedia Applications: Master's degree with minimum 55% marks in the related field with NET/Ph.D preferably with relevant Industrial/teaching experience. B.Com (Vocational): M.Com with minimum 55% marks and NET/Ph.D and preferably with relevant industrial/teaching experience. B.Voc in Tourism and Hospitality Management: A Master's degree with 55% marks in Tourism/Management with NET/Ph.D. and preferably with relevant industrial/teaching experience. All Posts: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in relevant subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University with SLET/NET/Ph.D and Industrial experience.

salary_details.details: Rs. 500/- per lecture subject to maximum of Rs. 25,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CUTN Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CUTN Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CUTN Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Voc in Digital Journalism and Multimedia Applications: Master's degree with minimum 55% marks in the related field with NET/Ph.D preferably with relevant Industrial/teaching experience. B.Com (Vocational): M.Com with minimum 55% marks and NET/Ph.D and preferably with relevant industrial/teaching experience. B.Voc in Tourism and Hospitality Management: A Master's degree with 55% marks in Tourism/Management with NET/Ph.D. and preferably with relevant industrial/teaching experience. All Posts: Master's degree with 55% marks (or an equivalent grade in a point-scale wherever the grading system is followed) in relevant subject from an Indian University, or an equivalent degree from an accredited foreign University with SLET/NET/Ph.D and Industrial experience.

content_sections.heading: CUTN Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 500/- per lecture subject to maximum of Rs. 25,000/- per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty posts at CUTN?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty positions at Central University of Tamil Nadu is 27th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 500 per teaching hour, with a maximum monthly cap of Rs. 25,000. This is a temporary engagement.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with at least 55% marks in the relevant field, along with NET/Ph.D. Industrial or teaching experience is also preferred.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty roles?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for this interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty positions across various disciplines at the Central University of Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process is to be done via email. Interested candidates need to send their filled application form and relevant documents to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Assistant / Guest Faculty positions is scheduled for 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates with only a Master's degree apply?
faq.answer: While a Master's degree with 55% marks is a prerequisite, candidates are also expected to have cleared NET or possess a Ph.D. for most of the positions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct download link is provided for your convenience.
